titleStmt.title: The Ambassador in Bolivia ( Thurston ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Ambassador in Bolivia ( Thurston ) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
60. My 57, January 12.Not printed. ChacónGustavo Chacón, Minister for Foreign Affairs. informed me this morning that after consultation with the PresidentMaj. Gualberto Villarroel. he could state formally that Bolivia is in general accord with the agenda presented in your circular of January 5. Should the Bolivian Government eventually desire to submit any specific topic for inclusion in the agenda the Embassy will
be duly informed. A telegram confirming the foregoing will be dispatched today to Andrade.Victor Andrade, Bolivian Ambassador in the United States.

The Minister further stated that he will, of course, head the Bolivian delegation which will also include former Minister to Mexico Alfredo Sanjines and a group of advisers. Ambassador MontenegroCarlos Montenegro, Bolivian Ambassador in Mexico. probably also will be attached to the Bolivian delegation. Chacón said further that in replying to the Mexican invitation he is suggesting that the conference begin February 20.
